summary: Prolific Victorian novelist. Known for Chronicles of Barsetshire (The Warden, Barchester Towers) and the Palliser novels. Also wrote The Way We Live Now. Introduced freestanding mailboxes to England.

works.name: Chronicles of Barsetshire
works.description: Six-novel series set in fictional Barsetshire. Includes The Warden and Barchester Towers.

clues.clue: The Warden — Septimus Harding challenged by John Bold over his income from Hiram's Hospital; The Jupiter attacks him
examples: John Bold attacks the 800 pound income of Septimus Harding

clues.clue: Barchester Towers — Low Church Bishop Proudie and Mrs. Proudie; Obadiah Slope; Mr. Arabin
examples: Mr. Slope falls from grace with Bishop Proudie's wife

clues.clue: Six novels including The Small House at Allington and Framley Parsonage
examples: six-novel series set in a county

clues.clue: Harding plays imaginary violoncello when angry
examples: plays an imaginary violoncello with his right hand when he becomes angry

works.name: The Way We Live Now
works.description: His longest novel; Augustus Melmotte's railway speculation scheme.

clues.clue: Augustus Melmotte devises speculation scheme for Utah railway; commits suicide
examples: Melmotte devises a speculation scheme based on a railroad in Utah
prompted a flurry of articles in 2016 that compared this character's ascendancy to that of Donald Trump

works.name: Palliser Novels and Other
works.description: Six parliamentary novels. Also introduced mailboxes to England.

clues.clue: Palliser novels — Plantagenet Palliser becomes Prime Minister; Eustace Diamonds
examples: Plantagenet Palliser, who becomes Prime Minister

clues.clue: Mother Frances (Fanny) Trollope wrote Domestic Manners of the Americans
examples: wrote the travel book Domestic Manners of the Americans

clues.clue: Introduced freestanding mailboxes to England while working at the Post Office
examples: responsible for introducing freestanding mailboxes to England

comprehensive_summary: Anthony Trollope is a prolific Victorian novelist known for the Chronicles of Barsetshire and Palliser novels. The Warden follows Septimus Harding challenged by John Bold. Barchester Towers features Bishop Proudie, Mrs. Proudie, and Obadiah Slope. The Way We Live Now satirizes Augustus Melmotte's speculation scheme. He introduced mailboxes to England.

cards.front: Novel: Septimus Harding challenged by John Bold over income from Hiram's Hospital; smear campaign by The Jupiter
Novel: Low Church Bishop Proudie and his domineering wife
Novel: chaplain Obadiah Slope proposes to Eleanor Bold
Novel: Augustus Melmotte's speculation scheme for a Utah railway crashes the London stock exchange; he commits suicide
cards.back: The Way We Live Now (Anthony Trollope)
